company_name: Safe At Home Pet Sitting And Home Care LLC
tagline: Keeping Pets and Homes Safe. Giving You Peace of Mind.

hero.headline:
Your Pets Deserve Family-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: Leaving your pets behind should never mean worrying about them. Our certified, veteran-owned team treats every animal like our own — so you can travel, work, or celebrate knowing they are safe, happy, and loved.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pet Care & Home Services That<br class="hidden md:block"> Give You Peace of Mind
services.subtitle: Stop worrying about your pets and home while you are away. From daily dog walks to full house sitting, we handle everything so you can focus on what matters.

cards.title: Dog Walking
cards.description: Professional 30-minute or 60-minute walks that keep your dog exercised, happy, and mentally stimulated while you are at work or away from home.

cards.title: Drop-In Visits
cards.description: Scheduled home visits for feedings, potty breaks, medication administration, and litter box cleaning. Up to four visits per day in 30 or 60-minute sessions.

cards.title: House Sitting
cards.description: Comprehensive home care including security checks, package pickup, mail retrieval, plant watering, and coordination of cleaning and lawn care services.

cards.title: Pet Taxi
cards.description: Safe, reliable transportation for your pets to grooming appointments, veterinary visits, and other destinations across Desoto County.

cards.title: Package Pick-Up
cards.description: Secure retrieval and safekeeping of delivered packages while you are away from home, preventing theft and weather damage to your deliveries.

cards.title: Meet & Greet
cards.description: A free 30-minute consultation before services begin so your pets can get comfortable with their sitter and all care instructions are clearly understood.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pet Care

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Meet & Greet
steps.description: Contact us and we will set up a complimentary 30-minute visit. Your pets meet their sitter, and we go over every detail of their care routine and your home needs.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our certified, insured pet sitters arrive on schedule for every visit. You receive photo and video updates so you always know your pets are happy and your home is secure.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Time Away
steps.description: Whether you are traveling, at work, or celebrating a special occasion, your pets are in loving hands and your home is looked after. That is our promise.

about.label: Why Families Trust Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Pet-Certified, and Voted Desoto's Best
about.description: Founded by law enforcement veteran Mike Pate and his wife Stephanie, Safe At Home brings the discipline, reliability, and trustworthiness you would expect from a veteran-owned business. As Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International, we treat every pet as if it were our own. Voted Desoto's Best Pet Sitter in both 2024 and 2025, we have earned the trust of families across Desoto County through genuine love for animals and unwavering commitment to your peace of mind.

features.title: Law Enforcement Veteran Owned
features.description: Mike's career in law enforcement brings discipline, attention to detail, and a deep commitment to safety in everything we do.

features.title: Fully Insured for Pets & Property
features.description: Complete business insurance coverage protects your pets and your home. You can trust us with your most valued family members.

features.title: Photo & Video Updates Every Visit
features.description: We send regular photos and videos so you never have to wonder how your pets are doing. Stay connected no matter where you are.

pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the service that fits your needs. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts — just honest care for your pets and home.

guarantee.headline: Our "Peace of Mind" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any visit, we will make it right immediately — no questions asked. Your pets deserve the best care, and we will not stop until you and your furry family are happy. That is the Safe At Home promise.

faqs.question: How do I get started with your services?
faqs.answer: It all begins with a free 30-minute Meet and Greet. We will come to your home, meet your pets, go over their care routine, and answer any questions. From there, you can book services whenever you need them.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide us with a key or door code. We handle everything while you are away and send you photo and video updates after every visit so you always know what happened.

faqs.question: Are you insured and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are Certified Professional Pet Sitters through Pet Sitters International and carry full business insurance covering both your pets and your property. Your family is in safe hands.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve most of Desoto County, Mississippi, including Southaven, Hernando, Olive Branch, Horn Lake, and surrounding areas near Memphis, Tennessee. Contact us to confirm coverage in your area.

faqs.question: Can you administer medication to my pet?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle oral medications, eye drops, and other routine medications as part of our Drop-In Visit service. We will go over your pet's medication schedule during the Meet and Greet.

testimonials.name: Heather S.W.
testimonials.context: Emergency pet sitting before a family wedding
testimonials.text: They saved me at the last minute, the day before my daughter's wedding. My pet sitter cancelled on me and she swooped in to save the day. She knew just how to handle him. She sent me pictures and it made me and my daughter cry because we were so relieved.

testimonials.name: Angeleah O.
testimonials.text: Stephanie does such a great job with my Minnie! I love that she checks in with me, sends me updates, pictures and videos, and tells me all that she has done with Minnie for the day. Highly recommend her.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: Stephanie is not only professional but also prompt, ethical, and incredibly loving and caring to my dog. She is absolutely amazing.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pet Care You
Can Actually Trust?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free Meet and Greet today. No pressure, no commitment — just a chance for your pets to meet their new favorite person.
